programme.title: Car SOS
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend take on new classics to restore their glory.Renovations are carried out secretly from the owners.The team will have to deal with rust and broken engines.

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes
programme.desc: Every year, the world is filled with news about yet another failed or unsafe construction project.The series presents current and historical mishaps of engineers from around the world.

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes
programme.desc: Every year, the world is filled with news about yet another failed or unsafe construction project.The series presents current and historical mishaps of engineers from around the world.

programme.title: Mutant Weather
programme.desc: The program presents new weather phenomena caused by climate warming.They cause surprising changes in the world around us, to which we cannot adapt so quickly.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering: Season 13
programme.desc: There are many engineering projects in the world that have been abandoned for various reasons.The creators of the program present the stories of these structures and the people who created them.Behind each of them there is a fascinating and unique story.Viewers will discover the most spectacular examples of abandoned buildings from around the globe, including an underground Nazi base in France, designed to attack London, and a secret Japanese facility.We will find out why they were created and what led to their fall.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible: Secrets of Faith
programme.sub-title: Deconstruction of the Dead Sea Scrolls

programme.title: Forbidden History 4
programme.desc: The series is devoted to the extraordinary mysteries of history.Each episode will feature stories about treasures, conspiracy theories, ancient remains, lost civilizations and secrets of wars.

programme.title: Forbidden History 4
programme.desc: The series is devoted to the extraordinary mysteries of history.Each episode will feature stories about treasures, conspiracy theories, ancient remains, lost civilizations and secrets of wars.

programme.title: World War II: Secrets from Above
programme.desc: Aerial photos will show key places during World War II from a sky-high perspective.The authors of the series analyze the skirmishes between Hood and Bismarck, street fighting in Stalingrad and the defense of Berlin.

programme.title: Mega Building Collection
programme.desc: More impressive buildings will be presented, which attract attention with their scale and represent engineering achievements.

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes 3
programme.desc: Another series of the program in which viewers learn about current and historical mishaps of engineers from around the world.

programme.title: Giant Logistics
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the functioning of facilities such as terminals, airports and railway stations.Viewers will see how huge logistics platforms are organized.They will see the people who watch over them.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation 23
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the most famous accidents in recent years.Each episode will present a reconstruction of the events that led to the tragedy.The stories are complemented by reports from aviation experts.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation 23
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Mediterranean Sea
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the most famous accidents in recent years.Each episode will present a reconstruction of the events that led to the tragedy.The stories are complemented by reports from aviation experts.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures 6
programme.desc: Details of military solutions, tactics and technologies used by countries participating in World War II will be presented.The creators will reveal what the German anti-aircraft defense system looked like and will also talk about the Burma Death Railway.The 415 km long line was built by Japan.Its creation resulted in the death of thousands of people, mainly prisoners of war and civilians.Historians will also go on a journey around the Pacific islands, visiting places in Europe and Africa where fierce fighting took place.In the bunkers built on the territory of the Third Reich, you can still find remains of equipment and impressive fortifications.The enormous structures were intended to ensure that Hitler maintained control over the Old Continent.

programme.title: Mega Building Collection
programme.desc: More impressive buildings will be presented, which attract attention with their scale and represent engineering achievements.

programme.title: Forbidden History 2
programme.desc: People in power do not like it when new evidence appears that challenges established truths and concepts that were previously considered indisputable facts.Some stories from the past were specifically suppressed or suppressed, and anyone who tried to reveal them was detained or condemned - or both.Now the host of the program, Jamie Theakston, will get to the heart of matters that are taken for granted today.It will subject them to thorough research, investigation and analysis.In the next installment of the series, he will take a closer look at the lost treasure of Petra, the real Holy Grail, and the mystery of the Nazi UFO.Each of the six episodes is a different story, a different myth or mystery that has been hidden in the darkness of history for centuries Jamie Theakston investigates stories about the mysterious Illuminati order.He wonders whether this association really exists, and if so, where it is based and who its members are.According to some conspiracy theorists, writers and filmmakers, the Illuminati form a secret government that rules the entire world.In search of the truth about the Illuminati, the program's team goes to London and Paris.Writers, journalists and experts who have spent decades trying to learn something about the order speak in front of the cameras.We will also meet members of other secret societies determined to discover their incredible stories.

programme.title: Forbidden History 2
programme.desc: People in power do not like it when new evidence appears that challenges established truths and concepts that were previously considered indisputable facts.Some stories from the past were specifically suppressed or suppressed, and anyone who tried to reveal them was detained or condemned - or both.Now the host of the program, Jamie Theakston, will get to the heart of matters that are taken for granted today.It will subject them to thorough research, investigation and analysis.In the next installment of the series, he will take a closer look at the lost treasure of Petra, the real Holy Grail, and the mystery of the Nazi UFO.Each of the six episodes is a different story, a different myth or mystery that has been hidden in the darkness of history for centuries Jamie Theakston is looking for information about Greek oracles, especially the most famous ancient oracle - the temple of Apollo at Delphi, where the god transmitted his will through an ecstatic priestess.The authors of the program wonder who the young women were whose visions influenced the course of history.They also investigate what was behind the priestesses' spectacular trances and their gift of clairvoyance.Jamie Theakston and his team travel to Greece and Italy to verify various theories related to this aspect of ancient history.

programme.title: The Sum of All Cities
programme.desc: The authors will present the history of selected cities.They will reveal what lies behind the numbers determining population, cost of living, crime rates, temperature and GDP.

programme.title: Mega Building Collection
programme.desc: More impressive buildings will be presented, which attract attention with their scale and represent engineering achievements.

programme.title: The Abyss: The Rise and Fall of Nazism
programme.desc: Using previously unpublished archival materials and citing historical sources, an international team of experts presents a new image of Adolf Hitler's rule.

programme.title: The Abyss: The Rise and Fall of Nazism
programme.desc: Using previously unpublished archival materials and citing historical sources, an international team of experts presents a new image of Adolf Hitler's rule.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Employees of the Customs Service and the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry form a patrol guarding New Zealand's borders.The threat to the country is the smuggling of drugs, weapons and other illegal materials.

programme.title: Lost Cities Revealed with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Albert Lin explores ancient cities and learns the secrets of ancient builders.The respected scientist completed, among others:a search expedition for Genghis Khan's tomb in Mongolia.The researcher once again sets out on an extraordinary mission.Viewers will be able to watch him wander through the jungle, trying to find objects related to the Mayan settlement.As always, it is equipped with modern devices that allow you to scan the surroundings.The National Geographic envoy is not afraid of risk.He will break through untouched areas, cross wild rivers and slide down a rope into a giant cave.He will undertake all these daring feats to solve another mystery from the past.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: In their quest for world domination, during World War II, Germany constructed advanced military equipment, created deadly technologies, and built powerful defensive fortifications.Engineers working for the Nazis designed modern weapons, including those of mass destruction.The authors of the program present the most ambitious military projects.They tell the story of people working on weapons and other strategic inventions that were supposed to ensure the victory of the Third Reich.Although the Nazis ultimately lost the war, the military technologies created by their scientists proved groundbreaking.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation 21
programme.desc: Reconstructions of real plane crashes.By recreating the course of events, the program's creators try to understand what led to the unfortunate events.They recreate the circumstances in which the tragedy occurred: the weather, the atmosphere on board the plane, the decisions and actions of the pilots.They also show the work of people investigating the causes of disasters and conduct a computer flight simulation.Viewers can hear various comments from specialists and testimonies of witnesses to these events.The creators of the program will prove that air accidents are often caused by human slowness and lack of imagination.Each disaster is thoroughly analyzed and the lessons learned help minimize the number of tragedies in the future.
